description_long: This is a mid-century modern style TV stand or media cabinet, featuring a rectangular wooden body with a light, natural wood grain finish. The cabinet stands on four tapered wooden legs, giving it an elevated and airy appearance. The front face includes two open shelves on the left, one of which contains a few stacked books, and two drawers with horizontal handles on the right for concealed storage. A flat-screen television sits on top, with a remote control placed in front of it. The back of the TV is visible from the rear, showing ports and a power cable, while the cabinet's rear is plain except for the open shelves. The overall design is functional and stylish, suitable for living rooms or entertainment areas in urban homes.
description: A light wood TV stand with open shelves, drawers, and a flat-screen TV on top, supported by four tapered legs. The cabinet combines open and closed storage, with books and a remote visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the TV, remote, two open shelves with books, and two drawers with handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the TV and the depth of the cabinet, with the legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the TV, its ports and cable, and the open shelves with books; drawers are not visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the TV's thinness and the cabinet's side panel and legs.
